---
title: 'Progression stats'
subtitle: 'Two Stars; Two Wishes'
date: '2026-05-03'
author: John Wilson
title-block-style: none
format:
  revealjs:
    preview-links: false
    embed-resources: false
    center-title-slide: false
    controls: false
    width: 1200
    theme: solarized
    menu: false
    chalkboard:
      theme: whiteboard
      boardmarker-width: 5
      buttons: false
execute: 
  cache: false
canononical: false
#css: .css
---


```{r}
qs_palette <- c(
  gold   = '#fed251',
  dblue  = '#1e2a4c',
  lblue  = '#12436d',
  orange = '#f46a25',
  turq   = '#28a197',
  purple = '#801650',
  dgreen = '#0b4c0b',
  lgreen = '#5d9f3c',
  brown  = '#592c20',
  pink   = '#fc9e9d',
  lpink  = '#f9b3b5' 
)
```
